title: Disability Related Sports - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Disability Related Sports 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EUGENE FAMILY YMCA U CAN GYM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates on referrals by physicians for individuals with physical mobility challenges to strengthen or condition themselves in a gym. Personal attendants may accompany the individual; some staff is available. A special weight room with equipment designed for wheelchairs is available. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 686-9622 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES TOPSOCCER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a peer supportive, safe, and inclusive soccer environment that focuses on player development, skill building, and fun rather than competition. Held at various locations in Albany and Corvallis. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Ages 8-18 with intellectual, emotional, or physical disabilities Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-8844 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LITTLE LEAGUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides baseball and softball programs. Some leagues offer a Challenger Division for youth with physical and developmental disabilities. Eligibility: Ages 4-16 Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY OSU IMPACT IMPACT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a physical activity program. Participants engage in activities such as swimming, dancing, ball games, climbing wall challenges, and balance exercises. Each child receives individualized attention, support, and encouragement from specially trained OSU undergraduate volunteers or graduate students. 123 Women's Building Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Serves children with special needs ages 6 months–21. Some services are available for individuals age 21 and older with special needs Hours: School year: Friday 5:30pm-7pm Summer hours: Friday 9:30am-11am Email (541) 737-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE FAMILY YMCA U CAN GYM JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES TOPSOCCER OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY IMPACT
